positive: A minimalist illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and twisting, root-like trees glow softly against a deep indigo night sky. The composition features a central path leading into the glowing woods, with star constellations visible overhead. Use a vaporwave aesthetic mixed with clean line art and vibrant cyan, magenta, and lime green accents. Strong, high-contrast silhouette of the trees and fungi. Flat graphic design suitable for screen printing, with defined edges and negative space. Vector art quality, 4k resolution, centered composition, no gradients (or use minimal, smooth gradients).
negative: blur, sketch, photorealistic, text, watermark, low quality, poorly drawn, artifact, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, gradient noise
